'''Jedi Headquarters''' was a building in [[Galactic City/Legends|New Republic City]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that served as a base of operations for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]]. It was constructed over the preserved ruins of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] of the old [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==History==
The Headquarters building was a domed structure with a number of [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] rooms with a style apparently borrowed from the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It was decorated inside with numerous carving and statues of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Whether these were commissioned for the building or moved from other locations is unknown. A ceremony to mark [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|the wedding]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] was held in the Headquarters building.

This structure was destroyed during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion of Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. Its destruction revealed the foundations of the former Jedi Temple once more, which later became the site of [[Irek Ismaren]]'s apparent death.
